- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	<!-- Professional pharmacy website with PHP, MySQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, barcode scanning, medication database management -->

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	<!-- Professional pharmacy website structure created with PHP, MySQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript files -->

- [x] Customize the Project
	<!-- Fully functional pharmacy management system with medication database, barcode scanning, search filters, and responsive design -->

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	<!-- No additional extensions required for PHP web project -->

- [x] Compile the Project
	<!-- PHP project does not require compilation - ready to run on web server -->

- [x] Create and Run Task
	<!-- PHP web project does not require VS Code tasks - runs on web server -->

- [x] Launch the Project
	<!-- Project ready to launch - requires web server with PHP and MySQL setup -->

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	<!-- README.md created with complete setup instructions and project documentation -->
